query: ALTER TABLE ops_cameras ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rtspUrl TEXT NULL AFTER streamUrl; ALTER TABLE ops_cameras ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS go2rtcStreamName VARCHAR(100) NULL AFTER rtspUrl; ALTER TABLE ops_cameras ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS go2rtcServerUrl TEXT NULL AFTER go2rtcStreamName; ALTER TABLE ops_cameras ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batteryLevel INT NULL AFTER isOnline; ALTER TABLE ops_cameras ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastOnlineAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER batteryLevel;
